title: Mitch Daniels to serve as Purdue’s interim leader until next president named
description:
Daniels served as Purdue president from 2013-2022 after two terms as Indiana governor.
The post Mitch Daniels to serve as Purdue's interim leader until next president named appeared first on Inside INdiana Business.

title: Late pass gives Felix Rosenqvist the closest Indianapolis 500 win in history
description:
Felix Rosenqvist swung to the outside of David Malukas, then found a way past the Team Penske driver to win the closest Indianapolis 500 in history by a margin of 0.0233 seconds on Sunday.

title: Cummins must pay $23.3M in damages in trade-secret lawsuit, jury says
description:
Columbus, Indiana-based Cummins Inc. must pay $23.3 million in damages to a California-based tech firm that had accused the manufacturer of stealing its trade secrets, a jury decided.

title: Campaign seeks to raise funds for Ernie Pyle & Veterans Memorial Park
description: The group behind the Ernie Pyle WWII Museum in the Vermillion County town of Dana has launched a fundraising campaign for the further expansion of the Ernie Pyle & Veterans Memorial Park. The campaign, "$250,000 for

title: Governor says Indiana may have ‘flexibility’ to extend gas tax suspension again
description: Hoosier motorists could continue getting a break on state gas taxes beyond early June after Gov. Mike Braun said Friday that he could have the authority to extend his tax suspension under Indiana’s energy emergency law.
